# add_sex { #cdmconnector.add_sex }

```python
add_sex(table, cdm, *, sex_name='sex', missing_sex_value='None')
```

Add sex from person (gender_concept_id: 8507 Male, 8532 Female).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name              | Type   | Description                                | Default    |
|-------------------|--------|--------------------------------------------|------------|
| table             | Any    | Ibis table with person_id or subject_id.   | _required_ |
| cdm               | Cdm    | CDM reference (person).                    | _required_ |
| sex_name          | str    | Output column name (default "sex").        | `'sex'`    |
| missing_sex_value | str    | Value for unknown gender (default "None"). | `'None'`   |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                  | Description            |
|--------|-----------------------|------------------------|
|        | ibis.expr.types.Table | Table with sex column. |
